entities.grandmother: an elderly grandmother in a floral dress

scenes.title: The Cozy Kitchen
scenes.background_prompt: A warm, cozy kitchen with a gas stove, copper pots hanging on the wall, a wooden chair with a cushion, and a window with lace curtains. Snow is visible through the window. No people, no animals.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A warm, cozy kitchen with yellow walls. An elderly grandmother with white hair pulled into a bun, wearing a floral dress with a lavender apron, stands at the gas stove stirring a large pot with a wooden spoon. She is positioned directly in front of a window, partially blocking the view through it. Behind her, through the window with lace curtains, heavy snowflakes fall against a dark gray sky, and snow covers the ground and tree branches outside. The snowy window is only partially visible because the grandmother stands in front of it. A gray cat with green eyes sleeps curled up on a cushioned wooden chair to the right, its tail draped over the edge. Copper pots hang from hooks on the wall, and a shelf holds jars of spices. The kitchen feels warm and inviting with soft golden light from a lamp above the stove.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place grandmother at the gas stove, standing and stirring a large pot with a wooden spoon. Position her directly in front of the window, partially blocking the view of snow falling outside. Place cat curled up on the cushioned wooden chair (right), sleeping with tail draped over edge.
scenes.scene_description: In the foreground on the left, a stone wall sits beneath a wooden windowsill. A wooden chair with a slatted back and four legs is positioned in front of the wall, holding a blue and white checkered cushion. A grey tabby cat is curled up asleep on the cushion, its head tucked toward the right. The floor consists of wide, horizontal wooden planks that stretch across the room to a circular, multi-toned brown woven rug in the bottom right corner. In the center of the scene, a grandmother stands facing right. She has grey hair pulled into a bun, wears round spectacles, and has a pleasant expression. She is dressed in a long-sleeved green dress patterned with small yellow and blue flowers and wears dark brown shoes. She holds a wooden spoon and is stirring a steaming copper pot located on the left burner of a dark green stove. The stove features five circular knobs on its front panel and a large oven door with a rectangular window. To the right of the stove is a light-colored wooden cabinet and a countertop with a brown speckled surface, backed by white tiles with a floral motif. In the background, two windows with white lace curtains and valances offer a view of a snowy landscape with rolling hills and green pine trees under a grey, snow-filled sky. On the yellow-toned walls, two black wrought-iron racks hang, supporting five copper pans and two dark grey pans of varying sizes. Two bundles of dried green herbs hang from the wall to the right of the central window.

The cat wants to take a nap

Curling up on a checkered cushion
CO: Steam rises from the hot pot
The kitchen stays warm and cozy
